faq.emergency: Our 24/7 Emergency & Trauma Centre is located at the main gate entrance. Call 1800-xxx-xxxx for ambulance dispatch.
faq.reports: Digital reports are available within 4 hours via our patient app or by presenting your Reference ID at the Report Desk (Level 1).
faq.visiting_hours: 5:00 PM to 8:00 PM daily. ICU visiting hours: 11:00 AM to 12:00 PM and 5:00 PM to 6:00 PM.
faq.parking: Multi-level parking is available at Basement B1 and B2. First 2 hours free with OPD token.
faq.insurance: We accept all major TPA and cashless insurance. Please carry your mediclaim card for direct billing.
faq.second_opinion: We have a dedicated Second Opinion Clinic every Saturday 9 AM to 1 PM. Prior appointment required.
